log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Khenra — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Khenra — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Khenra — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Khenra — Bardic Musician HP: 48/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Khenra — Bardic Musician --- HP: 48/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Khenra — Bardic Musician --- HP: 48/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 174/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 174/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Khenra — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Khenra — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 27 damage. Khenra — Bardic Musician HP: 21/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 13] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Khenra — Bardic Musician HP: 12/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Khenra — Bardic Musician HP: 1/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Khenra — Bardic Musician --- HP: 1/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Khenra — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 174/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Khenra — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Khenra — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Khenra — Bardic Musician HP: -19/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
